summary: Classified the PR-inventory shard independently as requested. No GitHub mutations, merge, or fix artifacts are planned because this job disables instant close, merge, fix, raise_pr, and low-signal closeout. One validator-identified security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling, and two PRs need specific maintainer judgment because hydrated evidence shows competing implementation paths.
